MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-17-2018 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE AND TRIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS 11/5/18 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 11/14/18. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
